trampler.scoutwalker.strengths: Exceptional speed and mobility allow the Scout Walker to flank enemies and escape danger. Low profile makes it hard to hit at range, and its reconnaissance tools reveal enemy positions to the entire crew.
trampler.scoutwalker.teamComp: Pair with a heavy Trampler like Iron Colossus for a recon-tank combo. Scout Walker spots enemies while the tank holds the line. Add a support player with rifle for ranged cover.
trampler.scoutwalker.tip1: Use elevation and cover to maintain reconnaissance without being spotted
trampler.scoutwalker.tip2: Flanking attacks deal bonus damage. Always approach from the side or rear
trampler.scoutwalker.tip3: Retreat speed is faster than attack speed. Use this to kite enemies
trampler.ironcolossus.strengths: Unmatched durability and firepower make the Iron Colossus a fortress on legs. Can absorb massive damage while dishing out devastating attacks, and its defensive modules protect nearby allies.
trampler.ironcolossus.teamComp: Anchor of any crew. Pair with a Scout Walker for reconnaissance and a Desert Hawk for extraction. The Iron Colossus holds positions while faster Tramplers complete objectives.
trampler.ironcolossus.tip1: Position between enemies and your crew to absorb damage and protect allies
trampler.ironcolossus.tip2: Use siege mode to increase damage output when you do not need to move
trampler.ironcolossus.tip3: Do not overextend. Your slow speed means retreating is costly
trampler.sandstalker.strengths: Versatile combat performance across all ranges and situations. Balanced stats mean no critical weaknesses, and its modular design allows quick loadout swaps between missions.
trampler.sandstalker.teamComp: Fits into any crew composition. Excels in balanced teams with one Light and one Heavy Trampler. Its versatility means it can fill any role the crew needs mid-mission.
trampler.sandstalker.tip1: Switch between ranged and close combat based on the situation for maximum flexibility
trampler.sandstalker.tip2: Use balanced loadouts that cover multiple scenarios rather than specializing
trampler.sandstalker.tip3: Communicate with your crew to fill whatever role is needed mid-mission
trampler.dunefortress.strengths: Massive cargo capacity and defensive capabilities create a mobile forward operating base. Crew can craft, repair, and resupply without returning to camp, making extended expeditions possible.
trampler.dunefortress.teamComp: Best as the core of a support-oriented crew. Pair with two combat Tramplers who go on the offensive while the Dune Fortress provides crafting, repairs, and a safe retreat point.
trampler.dunefortress.tip1: Set up your mobile base near extraction points for quick turnaround
trampler.dunefortress.tip2: Keep crafting materials stocked to repair other Tramplers mid-mission
trampler.dunefortress.tip3: Use your size as mobile cover for lighter Tramplers during firefights
trampler.deserthawk.strengths: Fastest extraction capability in the game. Superior evasion stats and speed-based abilities make it nearly impossible to pin down.
trampler.deserthawk.teamComp: Designated extractor. Pair with combat-focused Tramplers who secure the area while the Desert Hawk grabs loot and reaches extraction. Ideal in hit-and-fade crew strategies.
trampler.deserthawk.tip1: Always know where the nearest extraction point is before engaging
trampler.deserthawk.tip2: Use speed boosts to escape Storm Dive ambushes from other crews
trampler.deserthawk.tip3: Prioritize high-value loot targets. You can grab and go faster than anyone
trampler.warcaravan.strengths: Largest cargo hold of any Trampler allows transporting massive hauls in a single run. Strong defensive capabilities protect valuable loot, and its size intimidates smaller crews.
trampler.warcaravan.teamComp: Works best with an escort crew of combat Tramplers. The War Caravan carries the loot while escorts handle threats. Great for high-yield farming runs with a coordinated team.
trampler.warcaravan.tip1: Never travel alone. Always have at least one escort Trampler
trampler.warcaravan.tip2: Use your cargo capacity as leverage in crew negotiations for better loot splits
trampler.warcaravan.tip3: Defensive stances reduce incoming damage significantly while carrying heavy loads
trampler.scavengerrig.strengths: Enhanced looting mechanics find hidden items and bonus resources that other Tramplers miss. Efficient inventory management and quick-loot abilities speed up raids significantly.
trampler.scavengerrig.teamComp: Complements aggressive crews by maximizing loot yield. Pair with combat Tramplers who clear enemies while the Scavenger Rig efficiently loots the area.
trampler.scavengerrig.tip1: Scan areas thoroughly. Your enhanced sensors find loot others miss
trampler.scavengerrig.tip2: Quick-loot during combat while enemies focus on your combat Trampler allies
trampler.scavengerrig.tip3: Prioritize rare materials over common ones to maximize cargo value
trampler.rustviper.strengths: Devastating burst damage in hit-and-run attacks. Can strike, deal massive damage, and retreat before enemies can respond. Low maintenance costs make it budget-friendly.
trampler.rustviper.teamComp: Harassment specialist. Works with a heavy Trampler that draws fire while the Rust Viper flanks for burst damage. Add a support player for healing for a deadly ambush crew.
trampler.rustviper.tip1: Strike from stealth for maximum burst damage on first hit
trampler.rustviper.tip2: Never stay in a fight longer than one attack cycle. Hit and reposition
trampler.rustviper.tip3: Use terrain features for hit-and-run cover between strikes
trampler.orehauler.strengths: Highest resource yield per farming run thanks to specialized mining and gathering tools. Stable and reliable, with low operating costs that maximize profit margins.
trampler.orehauler.teamComp: Farming crew anchor. Pair with a combat Trampler for protection and a Scout Walker for navigation. The Ore Hauler focuses on gathering while the crew keeps it safe.
trampler.orehauler.tip1: Focus on resource nodes that respawn quickly for efficient farming loops
trampler.orehauler.tip2: Avoid combat entirely. Your value is in gathering, not fighting
trampler.orehauler.tip3: Upgrade gathering tools before weapons to maximize yield per run
trampler.wreckagecrawler.strengths: Free starter Trampler with no unlock cost. Easy to pilot and maintain, making it perfect for learning game mechanics. Decent mobility for early-game exploration.
trampler.wreckagecrawler.teamComp: Starter crew choice. Works well with any other beginner Trampler. Focus on learning the basics while a more experienced crewmate handles the heavy lifting.
trampler.wreckagecrawler.tip1: Use your low profile to hide behind cover that larger Tramplers cannot use
trampler.wreckagecrawler.tip2: Focus on learning map layouts and extraction routes while piloting this starter
trampler.wreckagecrawler.tip3: Save resources for upgrading to a better Trampler as soon as possible
